services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for every real estate need.
services.investmentConsultingDesc: Market analysis, property selection and investment strategy. For investors, entrepreneurs and individuals.
services.renovationsDesc: Complete renovations of residential and commercial properties. For homeowners and investors.
services.propertyManagementDesc: Complete property management and utilization services for maximum returns.
services.propertyValuationDesc: Analysis and estimation of the real market value of a property.
services.brokerageDesc: Property sales, purchases and rentals with full support.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Take a look at some of the projects we have completed.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Meet the team behind Group 110.
about.storyText: Group 110 is a consulting and property management company active in the field of real estate investments and renovations. Our goal is to provide complete solutions from market analysis to project completion.
about.visionText: To become the leading partner in Greece for real estate investments and property development.
about.valueReliabilityDesc: Every promise becomes action. Trust is built through deeds.
about.valueInnovationDesc: We apply modern solutions for maximum efficiency.
about.valueEfficiencyDesc: We always aim for the best possible outcome.
about.valueTransparencyDesc: Full communication at every step of our collaboration.
